title: Waboom Mod
description:
A mod for adding only one advancement.
Waboom is a castle which is NOT included.
Everyone who starts a new world gets the advancement.
body:
This Mod adds one and oly one advancment to the game. 
Everyone gets it when they join a server or just start a world.
Waboom is a castel and is a insider from a few friends.
Also there is no use but cosmetic usage.
By installing this mod you get near to the feeling of being a part of the group.
The Advancement is called Waboom and the describtion says: You got Waboomed, because it sounds like Boom.
Just a litle Joke if you put it in a modpack for your friends.
